title: Ray Tracer
description: Monte Carlo path tracer with BVH acceleration and physically-based materials. Renders in ~40ms per frame on a Ryzen 9.

title: Motor Controller
description: PID velocity controller for a BLDC motor on STM32F4. Sub-millisecond loop time, CAN bus telemetry.

title: TOML Parser
description: Zero-dependency TOML 1.0 parser in C++17. Typed API, structured error recovery, 100% spec-compliant.

title: This Site
description: Static portfolio with tag-filtered tile grid. Served via Caddy + containerised nginx. No framework.

title: Mesh Simplifier
description: QEM edge-collapse decimation with UV preservation. Reduces 1M-triangle meshes to 10k in under a second.

title: Log Analyzer
description: Parses structured logs from distributed services and renders flamegraphs. Handles 500MB+ files via streaming.

title: MIDI Sequencer
description: Step sequencer with pattern chaining and swing. Built on rtmidi with a Tkinter UI. Outputs to any MIDI device.

title: Terrain Generator
description: Procedural terrain via fBm noise and GPU tessellation. Exports heightmaps + mesh for game engine import.
